items.title: Trump Adds A New Chapter To Detroit-Canada Bridge Saga
items.description: For years, there have been efforts for a new U.S. Canada bridge near Detroit. Donald Trump has added a new chapter to the saga.

items.title: 5 Ways AI Is Remaking US Healthcare Today
